title: SQL Server CDC Capture Flow
interaction_flow: --- [CDC Poll Iteration: executeIteration(context, partition, offsetContext)] ---
SqlServerStreamingChangeEventSource → self: commitTransaction() [if read-only or pauseBetweenCommits elapsed → dataConnection.commit() + metadataConnection.commit()]

SqlServerStreamingChangeEventSource → self: endTransaction(partition, sourceTime) [if endTransactionTimer elapsed → metadataConnection.didTransactionEnd() → dispatcher.dispatchTransactionCommittedEvent()]
SqlServerStreamingChangeEventSource → self: getToLsn(dataConnection, databaseName, lastProcessedPosition, maxTransactionsPerIteration)
[if maxTransactionsPerIteration==0] getToLsn → dataConnection: getMaxTransactionLsn(databaseName) → SQL: MAX(start_lsn) FROM cdc.lsn_time_mapping WHERE tran_id<>0
[else if fromLsn unavailable] getToLsn → dataConnection: getNthTransactionLsnFromBeginning(databaseName, maxOffset) → SQL: TOP N start_lsn FROM cdc.lsn_time_mapping
[else] getToLsn → dataConnection: getNthTransactionLsnFromLast(databaseName, fromLsn, maxOffset) → SQL: TOP N+1 start_lsn >= fromLsn FROM cdc.lsn_time_mapping
SqlServerStreamingChangeEventSource → dataConnection: isAgentRunning(databaseName) [if toLsn unavailable — guard check via sys.dm_server_services]
SqlServerStreamingChangeEventSource → dataConnection: incrementLsn(databaseName, lastCommitLsn) → SQL: sys.fn_cdc_increment_lsn(?) [advances fromLsn past last processed position]
SqlServerStreamingChangeEventSource → dataConnection: getNewChangeTables(databaseName, fromLsn, toLsn) → SQL: SELECT * FROM cdc.change_tables WHERE start_lsn BETWEEN ? AND ?
[if new tables found] → getChangeTablesToQuery(partition, offsetContext, toLsn) → tablesSlot.set(tables) + schemaChangeCheckpoints.add(table)
SqlServerStreamingChangeEventSource → self: getChangeTablesToQuery(partition, offsetContext, toLsn)
getChangeTablesToQuery → dataConnection: getChangeTables(databaseName, toLsn)
dataConnection → SQL Server: SELECT captured_columns (cdc.captured_columns)
dataConnection → SQL Server: SELECT change_tables (cdc.change_tables WHERE ct.start_lsn <= toLsn, partitioned by source_object_id)
dataConnection returns: List<SqlServerChangeTable>
getChangeTablesToQuery: filter by connectorConfig.getTableFilters().dataCollectionFilter()
getChangeTablesToQuery: [if multiple captures for same table] set stopLsn on older + fetch schema for newer
getChangeTablesToQuery → dataConnection: getTableSchemaFromTable(databaseName, changeTable) [for new/future tables → DatabaseMetaData.getColumns + readPrimaryKeyOrUniqueIndexNames]
getChangeTablesToQuery → dispatcher: dispatchSchemaChangeEvent(partition, offsetContext, tableId, SqlServerSchemaChangeEventEmitter[CREATE]) [new tables]
--- [Inner Loop: process all change rows across all tables in LSN order] ---
SqlServerStreamingChangeEventSource: for each SqlServerChangeTable → new SqlServerChangeTablePointer(table, dataConnection, fromLsn, toLsn, fetchSize)
SqlServerChangeTablePointer.next() → getNextResultSet(lastPositionSeen)
SqlServerChangeTablePointer → dataConnection: getChangesForTable(changeTable, fromLsn, toLsn, maxRows)
[FUNCTION mode] SQL: SELECT cols FROM cdc.fn_cdc_get_all_changes_<capture>(fromLsn, toLsn, 'all update old') WHERE LSN range ORDER BY start_lsn, seqval, operation
[DIRECT mode]   SQL: SELECT cols FROM cdc.<changeTable> WHERE LSN range ORDER BY start_lsn, command_id, seqval, operation
dataConnection: getFromLsn() — adjusts fromLsn to max(changeTable.startLsn, intervalFromLsn); falls back to getMinLsn(sys.fn_cdc_get_min_lsn) if null
returns: ResultSet (open cursor)
SqlServerStreamingChangeEventSource: priority-queue scan — find tableWithSmallestLsn across all SqlServerChangeTablePointers (compare by commit_lsn, seqval, operation)
[skip] if changePosition < lastProcessedPositionOnStart (replay dedup after restart)
[skip] if changeTable.stopLsn <= commitLsn (older capture instance superseded)
[schema migration] if commitLsn >= schemaChangeCheckpoints.peek().startLsn → migrateTable()
migrateTable → metadataConnection: getTableSchemaFromTable(databaseName, newTable)
migrateTable → dispatcher: dispatchSchemaChangeEvent(partition, offsetContext, tableId, SqlServerSchemaChangeEventEmitter[ALTER])
[UPDATE op=1 before] tableWithSmallestLsn.next() → fetch 'after' row (op=2)
SqlServerStreamingChangeEventSource → offsetContext: setChangePosition(changePosition, eventCount)
SqlServerStreamingChangeEventSource → dispatcher: dispatchDataChangeEvent(partition, tableId, SqlServerChangeRecordEmitter(partition, offsetContext, operation, data, dataNext, clock, config))
tableWithSmallestLsn.next() [advance cursor; triggers getNextResultSet with pagination if fetchSize limit reached]
--- [End of inner loop] ---
SqlServerStreamingChangeEventSource → dataConnection: rollback() [terminate transaction to allow CDC cleanup]
streamingExecutionContext.setLastProcessedPosition(TxLogPosition.valueOf(toLsn))
[if no data] → dispatcher: dispatchHeartbeatEvent(partition, offsetContext)
key_relationships: SqlServerStreamingChangeEventSource has_two SqlServerConnection: dataConnection (CDC data reads) + metadataConnection (schema + agent checks)
SqlServerStreamingChangeEventSource has EventDispatcher, ErrorHandler, SqlServerDatabaseSchema, SqlServerConnectorConfig, NotificationService
SqlServerChangeTablePointer delegates to SqlServerConnection.getChangesForTable() for paginated ResultSet
SqlServerChangeTable holds: captureInstance, startLsn, stopLsn, sourceTableId, capturedColumns, sourceTable(Table)
SqlServerConnectorConfig.DataQueryMode enum: FUNCTION (via fn_cdc_get_all_changes_*) | DIRECT (via change table directly)

lsn_boundary_logic.fromLsn: lastCommitLsn + increment (sys.fn_cdc_increment_lsn), or raw lastCommitLsn on first run after restart
lsn_boundary_logic.toLsn: MAX(start_lsn) from cdc.lsn_time_mapping, or Nth transaction LSN if maxTransactionsPerIteration > 0

sql_queries.getMaxTransactionLsn: SELECT MAX(start_lsn) FROM cdc.lsn_time_mapping WHERE tran_id <> 0x00
sql_queries.getNthTransactionLsnFromBeginning: SELECT MAX(start_lsn) FROM (SELECT TOP N start_lsn FROM cdc.lsn_time_mapping ...)
sql_queries.getNthTransactionLsnFromLast: SELECT MAX(start_lsn) FROM (SELECT TOP N+1 start_lsn FROM cdc.lsn_time_mapping WHERE start_lsn >= lastLsn ...)
sql_queries.getChangeTables: WITH ordered_change_tables AS (ROW_NUMBER OVER PARTITION BY source_object_id, start_lsn ...) SELECT ... WHERE ct_sequence=1 [AND start_lsn <= toLsn]
sql_queries.getCapturedColumns: SELECT object_id, column_name FROM cdc.captured_columns ORDER BY object_id, column_id
sql_queries.getNewChangeTables: SELECT * FROM cdc.change_tables WHERE start_lsn BETWEEN fromLsn AND toLsn
sql_queries.getChangesForTable_FUNCTION: SELECT cols, TODATETIMEOFFSET(fn_cdc_map_lsn_to_time(start_lsn),...) FROM cdc.fn_cdc_get_all_changes_<capture>(fromLsn, toLsn, 'all update old') WHERE LSN-range ORDER BY start_lsn, seqval, operation
sql_queries.getChangesForTable_DIRECT: SELECT cols FROM cdc.<changeTable> WHERE LSN-range ORDER BY start_lsn, command_id, seqval, operation
sql_queries.didTransactionEnd: SELECT TOP 1 start_lsn FROM sys.dm_cdc_log_scan_sessions ORDER BY session_id DESC
sql_queries.getCdcCapturePollingInterval: CALL sys.sp_cdc_help_jobs (read pollinginterval for capture job)

important_notes: Two SqlServerConnections are used: dataConnection for CDC reads (adaptive buffering), metadataConnection for schema + agent checks
updateChangePosition skipping logic prevents duplicate events after connector restart by comparing to lastProcessedPositionOnStart
UPDATE events are two consecutive rows (OP_UPDATE_BEFORE=1, OP_UPDATE_AFTER=2) and are paired before dispatch
Schema migration is triggered when a second capture instance exists for the same source table (detected via getChangeTables returning duplicates)
maxTransactionsPerIteration=0 means unbounded batch (getMaxTransactionLsn); >0 limits transactions per poll cycle
endTransactionTimerDelay = 2 × CDC capture polling interval (from sys.sp_cdc_help_jobs)
SqlServerChangeTablePointer supports paginated result sets via maxRowsPerResultSet/fetchSize (getNextResultSet called with lastPositionSeen for continuation)
DIRECT mode query orders by start_lsn, command_id, seqval, operation; FUNCTION mode by start_lsn, seqval, operation
NotificationService.notify('Capture Instance', 'COMPLETED') fired when stopLsn of a change table is passed by committed offset
